summary: Code review verification completed for P0 bug fix: Discogs collection import 1000-record limit removed. All three fixes verified via code inspection.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/records (line 115-130): Pipeline has NO $limit stage - verified by reviewing lines 117-128. Uses .to_list(None) at line 129 - FIXED
✅ GET /api/users/{username}/records (line 240-265): Uses .to_list(None) at line 258 instead of .to_list(1000) - FIXED
✅ _run_discogs_import (line 1009-1249): Line 1062 shows 'for page in range(2, total_pages + 1):' with NO min() cap - iterates through ALL pages
✅ Both /api/records and /api/discogs/import/progress endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests - auth working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: Discogs import was capped at 1000 records. Three fixes applied: (1) Removed $limit:1000 from get_my_records aggregation pipeline, (2) Changed .to_list(1000) to .to_list(None) in get_my_records line 129, (3) Changed .to_list(1000) to .to_list(None) in get_user_records line 258. Pagination loop in _run_discogs_import was already uncapped (line 1062). All verified via code inspection.

fix_1_get_my_records_no_limit_stage.status: VERIFIED - No $limit stage in aggregation pipeline
